channel.title: Gajim on Chatrix.One
channel.description: Recent content in Gajim on Chatrix.One

item.title: How to Install Gajim and Get Started with XMPP on Linux
item.description:
You want to try XMPP and you picked Gajim. Good choice. It’s a fully-featured client that works on Linux, Windows, and macOS, and it’s been around long enough to have everything polished. No command line needed.

If you’re on Windows, this guide still works for you. Everything from Step 3 onward is identical. The only difference is how you get the app: on Windows you download the installer from gajim.org instead of using the Software Center.
